name: Honeywell UDC3200 Universal Digital Temperature Controller
description: The Honeywell UDC3200 is a universal digital temperature controller with advanced PID control algorithms. Accepting thermocouple, RTD, mV, and mA inputs, it provides precise temperature regulation for furnaces, ovens, and reactors.
shortDescription: Digital temperature controller, universal input, dual output, PID control.
technicalDescription: 1/4 DIN digital controller with universal analog input, dual control outputs, and remote setpoint capability. Supports auto-tune PID, heat/cool control, and ramp/soak programming. RS485 Modbus communication option.
features: Universal input accepts TC, RTD, mV, mA signals
Auto-tune PID for optimal control response
Heat/cool dual output configuration
Configurable ramp/soak profile programming
RS485 Modbus serial communication
benefits: Reduces setup time with auto-tune function
Single controller handles multiple sensor types
Improves product quality with precise temperature control

technicalSpecifications.Input Type: TC (J, K, T, E, R, S, B), RTD (Pt100), mV, mA

seoTitle: Honeywell UDC3200 Universal Digital Temperature Controller
seoDescription: Honeywell UDC3200 PID temperature controller with universal input, dual outputs, auto-tune. For furnaces, reactors, and heat treatment ovens.

faq.question: What sensor types are supported?
faq.answer: Accepts thermocouple types J, K, T, E, R, S, B, 100 ohm platinum RTD, and linear mV/mA inputs.

faq.question: Does this controller have auto-tune?
faq.answer: Yes, the one-touch auto-tune function automatically calculates optimal PID parameters.

faq.question: What outputs are available?
faq.answer: Configurable with relay, SSR driver, or 4-20 mA analog output. Dual outputs support heat/cool control.

name: Siemens SIPART PS2 Smart Pressure Controller
description: The Siemens SIPART PS2 is a smart electropneumatic positioner and pressure controller for pneumatic control valves. With HART communication and automatic initialization, it provides precise valve position control in process industries.
shortDescription: Smart electropneumatic valve positioner, HART, 4-20 mA, IP66.
technicalDescription: Electropneumatic positioner for linear and rotary actuators with HART protocol, 4-20 mA input, and integrated pressure sensors. Automatic initialization and adaptation to actuator characteristics. NAMUR mounting compliant.
features: Automatic initialization and adaption to actuator
HART communication for remote diagnostics
Integrated pressure sensors for monitoring
NAMUR mounting bracket compatible
IP66 enclosure for harsh environments
benefits: Reduces commissioning time with auto-initialization
Enables predictive maintenance with diagnostic data
Low air consumption reduces operating costs
material: Polyamide Housing with Stainless Steel Components
seoTitle: Siemens SIPART PS2 Smart Pressure Controller
seoDescription: Siemens SIPART PS2 smart electropneumatic valve positioner with HART, auto-initialization, IP66. For precise control valve positioning.

faq.question: What types of actuators are compatible?
faq.answer: Both linear (sliding stem) and rotary (quarter-turn) actuators are supported with appropriate mounting kits.

faq.question: What diagnostic functions are available?
faq.answer: Includes partial stroke test, travel deviation monitoring, and I/P module health status.

faq.question: What is the air consumption?
faq.answer: Steady-state air consumption is typically 0.05 Nm³/h at 1.4 bar supply pressure.

name: ABB FT4000 Flow Controller with PID
description: The ABB FT4000 is a dedicated flow controller with integrated PID control and batch processing capabilities. Accepting pulse, analog, or frequency inputs from flow meters, it provides precise flow regulation and totalization.
shortDescription: Flow controller with PID, batch control, dual relay outputs, RS485.
technicalDescription: Panel-mount flow controller with multi-input capability, PID control loop, dual relay outputs, totalizer, and batch sequencing. RS485 Modbus for SCADA integration. Password-protected configuration.
features: Multi-input compatibility with most flow meters
PID control loop for closed-loop flow regulation
Batch control with preset and auto-manual operation
Dual relay outputs for alarms and control
RS485 Modbus RTU communication
benefits: Improves batch consistency with precise flow control
Reduces waste with accurate totalization
Simplifies system design with standalone operation
seoTitle: ABB FT4000 Flow Controller with PID
seoDescription: ABB FT4000 flow controller with PID, batch control, dual relays, RS485. For chemical dosing, water regulation, and batching processes.

faq.question: What flow meter types are compatible?
faq.answer: Compatible with electromagnetic, turbine, vortex, Coriolis, and ultrasonic flow meters with appropriate output signals.

faq.question: Can this be used for custody transfer?
faq.answer: The FT4000 can be configured for fiscal metering with password-protected totalizers and audit trail.

faq.question: How many batches can be programmed?
faq.answer: Up to 10 preset batch recipes can be stored in non-volatile memory.

name: Siemens SITRANS LR560 Level Controller
description: The Siemens SITRANS LR560 is a 80 GHz FMCW radar level controller for continuous level measurement and control in storage tanks and process vessels. With advanced signal processing and remote communication, it handles challenging media including steam, dust, and foam.
shortDescription: 80 GHz FMCW radar level controller, 100m range, 4-20 mA/HART, IP68.
technicalDescription: Continuous level transmitter with 80 GHz FMCW radar technology, 4-20 mA/HART output, and Profibus PA optional. Graphical local display with wizards for quick setup. Suitable for liquids, slurries, and solids.
features: 80 GHz FMCW radar for high accuracy and focus
100 meter measurement range
Graphical display with quick-start wizard
HART, Profibus PA, and Modbus communication
IP68 housing for submerged installation
benefits: Reliable measurement in steam, dust, and foam conditions
Reduces installation costs with small antenna size
Non-contact measurement eliminates maintenance

images.alt: Siemens SITRANS LR560 Radar Level Controller

seoTitle: Siemens SITRANS LR560 80 GHz Radar Level Controller
seoDescription: Siemens SITRANS LR560 80 GHz FMCW radar level controller, 100m range, ±2mm accuracy, HART. For storage tanks and process vessels.

faq.question: What is the minimum dielectric constant for measurement?
faq.answer: The 80 GHz radar can measure media with a dielectric constant as low as 1.5 (e.g., hydrocarbons).

faq.question: Can this be used in hazardous areas?
faq.answer: Yes, it is ATEX and IECEx certified for Zone 0 installations with appropriate approvals.

faq.question: What is the antenna cleaning requirement?
faq.answer: The non-contact design requires minimal cleaning. For sticky media, optional air-purge connections are available.

name: Honeywell DC2500 Digital PID Process Controller
description: The Honeywell DC2500 is a 1/16 DIN digital PID controller offering advanced process control for temperature, pressure, flow, and level applications. With universal input, dual outputs, and Ethernet connectivity, it provides versatile loop control.
shortDescription: 1/16 DIN PID controller, universal input, Ethernet, dual outputs.
technicalDescription: 1/16 DIN process controller with universal sensor input, dual analog/relay outputs, and built-in Ethernet communication. Advanced PID with adaptive tuning, fuzzy logic overshoot suppression, and ramp/soak capability.
features: Universal input for TC, RTD, 4-20 mA, 0-10V
Adaptive PID with fuzzy logic overshoot suppression
Built-in Ethernet with Modbus TCP
Ramp/soak profile programming up to 8 segments
Compact 1/16 DIN size saves panel space
benefits: Faster settling time with adaptive PID tuning
Reduces overshoot during process start-up
Simplifies network integration with built-in Ethernet
seoDescription: Honeywell DC2500 1/16 DIN PID controller with adaptive tuning, universal input, Ethernet Modbus TCP. For temperature, pressure, and flow control.

faq.question: What is the fuzzy logic overshoot suppression?
faq.answer: It automatically reduces PID output when approaching setpoint to prevent overshoot without slowing the response.

faq.question: Can this controller be used for pressure control?
faq.answer: Yes, with 4-20 mA input it can accept pressure transmitter signals and provide PID output.

faq.question: What software is available for configuration?
faq.answer: Honeywell DCConfig software provides PC-based configuration, monitoring, and data logging via Ethernet.

name: ABB Commander 260 PID Controller
description: The ABB Commander 260 is a 1/4 DIN process controller providing single-loop PID control with HART communication. Designed for a wide range of process variables including temperature, pressure, flow, and pH.
shortDescription: 1/4 DIN single-loop PID controller, HART, universal input, dual displays.
technicalDescription: Single-loop PID process controller with universal analog input, dual 5-digit displays, HART pass-through, and dual relays. Configurable via front panel or PC software. NEMA 4X front panel for washdown environments.
features: Universal analog input with sensor linearization
HART pass-through for smart transmitter configuration
Dual 5-digit displays for PV and SP
Cascade and ratio control modes
NEMA 4X front panel for wet environments
benefits: Simplified integration with HART device connectivity
Flexible control strategies with cascade and ratio modes
Durable construction for harsh manufacturing environments
seoDescription: ABB Commander 260 1/4 DIN PID controller with HART, universal input, dual display. For pH, temperature, pressure, and flow control.

faq.question: What is HART pass-through?
faq.answer: The controller can pass HART digital communication through its analog output to allow configuration of downstream HART field devices.

faq.question: Can this be used for cascade control?
faq.answer: Yes, the commander 260 supports cascade control with external setpoint from a secondary loop.

faq.question: Is the front panel washdown rated?
faq.answer: Yes, NEMA 4X (IP66) front panel allows direct washdown in food and pharmaceutical environments.

name: Honeywell HC900 Hybrid Controller (2 Loop)
description: The Honeywell HC900 is a hybrid loop and logic controller combining continuous PID control with ladder logic programming. This 2-loop controller provides an integrated solution for furnace, boiler, and batch applications requiring both analog and digital control.
shortDescription: Hybrid loop/logic controller, 2 PID loops, ladder logic, Ethernet.
technicalDescription: Hybrid controller with 2 analog PID loops, up to 16 digital I/O, and logic control via ladder diagram programming. Built-in Ethernet with Modbus TCP and OPC UA server. Local operator panel with touchscreen.
features: Combined PID loop control and ladder logic
Built-in 7-inch touchscreen operator interface
Ethernet with Modbus TCP and OPC UA server
Up to 16 digital I/O channels
SD card slot for data logging and recipe storage
benefits: Eliminates separate PLC and loop controller hardware
Reduces engineering complexity with unified programming
Improves operator visibility with built-in display

technicalSpecifications.Communication: Ethernet Modbus TCP, OPC UA, RS485

seoTitle: Honeywell HC900 Hybrid Loop and Logic Controller
seoDescription: Honeywell HC900 hybrid controller with 2 PID loops, ladder logic, 7" touchscreen, OPC UA. For boiler, furnace, and batch control.

faq.question: What is a hybrid controller?
faq.answer: A hybrid controller combines continuous PID loop control with discrete logic (ladder) control in a single device.

faq.question: Can this replace a PLC?
faq.answer: For small to medium applications requiring both analog loops and logic, yes. For large logic-only applications, a PLC may be more suitable.

faq.question: What software is used for configuration?
faq.answer: Honeywell Hybrid Control Designer software provides configuration and programming in a single environment.

name: Siemens SIPART DR20 Process Controller
description: The Siemens SIPART DR20 is a compact loop controller for simple PID control tasks in process engineering. With its standardized signal interface and compact housing, it is ideal as a backup controller or for decentralized control points.
shortDescription: Compact loop controller, 1/8 DIN, single PID loop, 4-20 mA, RS485.
technicalDescription: 1/8 DIN single-loop PID controller with universal input, 4-20 mA output, RS485 Modbus, and front panel configuration. Configurable for temperature, pressure, flow, and level control. Fixed setpoint or remote setpoint operation.
features: Universal process signal input
Single PID loop with auto-tune
RS485 Modbus RTU for remote monitoring
Compact 1/8 DIN panel-mount design
Password-protected configuration
benefits: Cost-effective solution for simple control tasks
Minimal panel space requirement
Easy configuration via clear front panel interface
seoTitle: Siemens SIPART DR20 Compact Loop Controller
seoDescription: Siemens SIPART DR20 1/8 DIN single-loop PID controller with auto-tune, RS485, universal input. For simple temperature and process control.

faq.question: Can this controller accept thermocouple input?
faq.answer: Yes, it accepts type J and K thermocouples as well as Pt100 RTD and 4-20 mA signals.

faq.question: Is remote setpoint available?
faq.answer: Yes, the controller can accept a remote setpoint from a 4-20 mA signal or via Modbus.

faq.question: What is the accuracy?
faq.answer: Accuracy is ±0.25% of span for analog inputs and ±0.5°C for thermocouple inputs.
